LanguageData.DP_Automortar.label: Automortar
LanguageData.DP_Automortar.description: An automatic mortar. Not intended for player use.
LanguageData.DP_Embrasure.label: Embrasure
LanguageData.DP_GenPowerUnit.label: Base Power Unit
LanguageData.DP_GenPowerUnit.description: Generates power for a faction base. Not intended for player use.
LanguageData.DP_HiddenExplosive.label: Hidden Trap
LanguageData.DP_HiddenFire.label: Hidden Trap
LanguageData.DP_HiddenSpike.label: Hidden Trap
LanguageData.DP_MinigunTurret.label: Minigun Turret
LanguageData.DP_MinigunTurret.description: A factional turret mounted with an automated minigun. Not intended for player use.
